titleStmt.title: SII 24.441: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 441. (A.R. No. 264 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records that the village Uttamaśīli which was formerly granted to the temple of Raṅganātha at Śrīraṅgam as Tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam for the god, having been included as a non-tenure village in Tiruchchirāpaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi at a later date was subsequently re-granted to the temple to provide for feeding the Śrivaishṇavas on the evidence of an old copper-plate grant produced by Siṅgarāchār, the agent of Kandāḍai Rāmānuja-Ayyaṅgār to Viśvanātha-Nāyaka, (the officer in charge) of the Tiruchchirāpaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1461, Vikāri Makara, śu, Ekādaśi, Monday, Mṛigaśīrsha regularly correspond to 1540, A.D. January 19, Monday f.d.t. ·03, f.d.n. ·17.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameścaraśrīvirapratāpa śrīvira Accyutarāyamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Arulṛāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 1 Itaṉ melc cellāniṉṟa vikārisamvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum somavāramum peṟṟa mṛgaśīrṣa nakṣatrattu
nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśacani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar paṇṭārattukku pūṟuvam Uttamaśīli tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka naṭaṉtu vanta kantāṭai Irāmāṉu[jayya]ṅkār Irāmāṉuja kū
(kū)ṭattukku viṭṭavan viḻukkāṭum naṭantu varukaiyil pinpu tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam yum piṟantu tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭiyil kūṭi naṭantu vantu Inta Uttamaśilikku pūrvatāmraśāsanam rāmānujakūṭattile peṇiiruntu pūrvattil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam yam piṟintu poka Oṇṇātu Inta tāmraśā(śā)sanam
kantāṭai Irāmānujayyaṅkār Atikāram ciṅkarācār kaiyile kuṭuttu Intap paandṭikku tiruccilāppawritten below the line.ḷḷi Ucāvaṭi viścanādha ṉāyakkaraikkoṇṭu tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka cettukkoḷḷukaiyil viṭṭavan viḻukkāṭṭile pūrvatāmraśāsanam paṇṇi vaittu Iruntu kuṭuttu kantāṭai rāmāṉujayyaṅkār rāmāṉujakūṭattukkuk kaṭṭaḷai
Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai 3 Ituvum Appam 3 Inta taḷikai muṉṟum Appam muṉṟum nāḷtoṟu kantāṭai rāmāṉujayyaṅkār rāmāṉujakūṭattil śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle Ācandrārkkasthādhiyāka śiṣyaparamparaiyāka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Inta cilācātanam EḻutiṉamaikkuThis symbol stands for kku •
koyil kaṇakku nārāṇan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.441 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
